title: Bridge Paper: Interoceptive training impacts the neural circuit of the anterior insula cortex.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.
**Phase context:** interoception, interoceptive, heart-brain, vagal, insula, cardiorespiratory, breathing entrainment

Paper: Interoceptive training impacts the neural circuit of the anterior insula cortex.
DOI: 10.1038/s41398-024-02933-9
Abstract: Interoception is the perception of afferent information that arises from anywhere and everywhere within the body. Recently, interoceptive accuracy could be enhanced by cognitive training. Given that the anterior insula cortex (AIC) is a key node of interoception, we hypothesized that resting functional connectivity (RSFC) from AIC was involved in an effect of interoceptive training. To address this issue, we conducted a longitudinal intervention study using interoceptive training and obtained RS
